series_description: Initiated following completion of payroll processing on a bi-weekly basis. Shows agency number, recap, voucher, house bill and bi-weekly pay period.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after audit by State Auditor and after audit report is released

series_description: Records relating to civil service lists and procedures implementing certification of employees within agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Publications produces by an agency detailing operations, regulations, and/or procedures of an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. Destroy if superseded and of no historical value to State Archives.

series_description: Copies of term contracts entered into by the Division of Purchasing on behalf of all agencies of the state of Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superceded by new term contracts

series_description: Printouts listing all warrants printed by the Auditor of State.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: (Except Payrolls) Used to cancel a warrant issued by an agency in error.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_title: GAF-25 CAS Reports & Inquiries by Data C
series_description: These are various computer generated reports dis- tributed by OBM to various state agencies. They fall into the following class ifications: a. Appropriation; b. Trial Balance; c. Vendor; d. Grant; e. Cap- ital Project; f. Revenue; g. Spending; h. Cash
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Expenditures documents. Authorize payment to a vendor other than a state agency for goods and/or services received.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_title: A-95 EVALUATIONS OF FEDERALLY FUNDED PROJECTS FROM OTHER DEPARTMENTS & AREAS
series_description: A-95 evaluationa of federally funded projects from other departments and areas.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after funding period

series_description: To determine case backlogs and regions that need investigators.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years

series_description: Statement of need, signed by Purchasing Officer or Fiscal Officer, justifying the purchase of equipment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 fiscal years

series_description: Perpetual inventory of equipment, furniture and items purchased for agency. Shows item description, vendor, date purchased and life expectancy.
retention_statement: Paper: Continually maintained.

series_description: Commissioner's Personnel Files
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 years from date of separation

series_description: Savings Bond Register
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent.

series_description: Case file containing charge affidavits of alleged unlawful discrimination, evidence, correspondence, charges, investitigative reports and recommendations for disposition of said charges. These cases are received from six regional offices of the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon final disposition of case, original file is retained by either regional office or off-site storage for 2 years from date of final action

series_description: BFOQ (Bona Fide Occupational Qualification) files include the request, investigation and Commission disposition.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years from denial and/or expiration of BFOQ.

series_description: Documentation regarding constituent concerns/complaints/questions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Follow-up on a case closed with a Conciliation Agreement and Consent Order (CACO) to insure the terms and agreements as stated in the (CACO)have been met.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months after closure

series_description: Documents tracking the receipt of boxes of closed case files from the regional offices and the Attorney General''s Office, their being labelled for storage off-site, and their retrieval from and return to off-site storage as needed. This would also include records documenting the destruction of old records under the Records Retention Schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years.

series_description: Memo to Attorney General''s Office to confirm the list of cases coming up for destruction are not open in any other forum.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 Years

series_description: Running list of open cases and their status in the Hearings Department such as pending hearings; cases that have settled, dismissed or withdrawn; cases that are indefinitely stayed because of court; and pending final order closures. As cases close they are deleted from the inventory.
retention_statement: Electronic: Closed cases are deleted from list upon closure.

series_description: Copies of Hearing Examiner Reports maintained in the Hearings Department for the Commission/Public to reference. Hearing Examiner Reports are recommendations to the Ohio Civil Rights Commission''s Commissioners regarding findings of fact and legal conclusions based on the hearing record and written by an administrative law judge.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 years.

series_description: Payroll Warrant Cancellation Advise & Transmittal. Used to cancel a payroll warrant issued by an agency in error.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Bi-weekly record of the distribution of the funding for all payroll programs.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years after audited by the Auditor of State and the audit is released.

series_description: Resumes and employment applications unsolicited by a job posting.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months.

series_description: Documentation to prepare the yearly IACP report which may include: planning documents; copies of narratives, flowcharts, and other systems documentation; vulnerability assessments; internal control checklists; test of controls; reports; inter/intra-agency communications; and agency review (ARES) information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: The I-9 form verifies the individual''s eligibility to work in the United States.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 years after employment or 1 year after separation, whichever is the later date.

series_description: Direct deposit authorization form, direct deposit cancellation form, voided check, account information on bank letterhead, or any attachment or form required to make a direct deposit change.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 pay periods.

series_description: Child care voucher application (ADM 4306) used to gather information needed to apply for child care benefits, yearly summary reports, support documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years.

series_description: Information or forms pertaining to employee medical matters including request accommodation requests, disability documents, accident/illness reports, FMLA, ADA and worker''s compensation.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year after separation.

series_description: Questionnaire filled out by separating employee.
retention_statement: Paper: 4 years.

series_description: W4 form, payroll deduction form, union/work sharing deduction form, municipal tax form, address change, or any form that that an employee submits for payroll processing purposes.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 pay periods.

series_description: Verification of employee income and employment.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year.

series_description: Includes email, text and telephone messages, post-it notes, drafts and other limited documents which serve to convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Log contains list of cases finalized and completed by the Ohio Civil Rights Commission for the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission. 472 Report, case transmittal records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Correspondence to/from Auditors and other officials requesting verification of the number and types of current charges filed against publicly funded entities, and the reply containing the requested information.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years.

series_description: Letters or other documents containing requests for copies of documents from closed case files, documents related to identifying the location of closed case files and retrieving copies of the requested documents, correspondence informing the requesting party of the cost of the documents, correspondence to and from a party regarding a public record request and the record request log, and transmitting the documents upon payment and the log (maintained in electronic format only) of these requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: All working papers, reports and other documentation generated under the Internal Audit Control Procedure such as: planning documents; copies of narratives, flowcharts, and other systems documentation; vulnerability assessments; internal control checklists; test of controls; reports,inter/intra-agency communications; agency review information.
retention_statement: Paper: Two years after audit

series_description: Payroll Warrant Cancellation Advise
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years

series_description: Inter/Intra-State Transfer Voucher. Inter/Intra-Departmental Requisition. Inter-Departmental Purchase Order.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after the audit

series_description: Forms used by a person/organization to enter into a contract with the agency to request payment for services rendered or to amend contract. May include attendance forms, or other correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after audit

series_description: (Alteration) Used to modify informaiton already established on a previous purchase order.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after audit

series_description: Represents an agency''s intent to purchase goods and/or services; reserves appropriation funds for future spending until the funds are formally obligated (encumbered).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after audit

series_description: Used to make purchases of materials, supplies, and equipment and to make direct purchases or engage in contracts of services that exceed $50,000.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State ; Electronic: Retain 2 years or until audited by Auditor of State

series_description: (Accounts Payable Invoices) Bill for goods shipped or services rendered. They are matched with purchase orders and receiving reports, and attached to vouchers for payment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years or until audited by Auditor of State

series_description: Lease records of lands or buildings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after expiration of lease

series_description: Affirmative Action Progress Reports filed with the Ohio Civil Rights Commission, and the annual report prepared by Compliance Department pursuant to 4112.04(A)(10).
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years

series_description: Record of the auto license number on the state vehicles in use at the agency and regional offices.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until vehicle transferred or disposed of

series_description: Document funds received by the agency for miscellaneous items.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years or until audited by Auditor of State

series_title: Claim For Reissuance of Voided Warrant
series_description: Forms used to reissue another warrant once a warrant has been voided.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years or until audited by Auditor of State

series_description: Forms used to make purchases from other state agencies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years or until audited by Auditor of State

series_description: Including tapes, transcriptions, exhibits, and any documents filed including pleadings, motions, briefs, reports and recommendations, objections and the final order.
retention_statement: Electronic: 2 Years after final disposition ; Paper: 2 Years after final disposition

series_description: Official minutes of the regular and special meetings of the Ohio Civil Rights Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three years. ; Electronic: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Inquiries and responses from and to the public, exclusive of Executive Correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Yearly printout on agency employees indicating race and sex. Updated yearly and forwarded to DAS, Division of EEO.
retention_statement: Electronic: Continually maintained until of no longer administrative value. ; Paper: Continually maintained until of no longer administrative value.

series_description: Annual Report to the Internal Revenue Service and the employee of the gross salary or wages earned and the amount withheld for income taxes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Under the Immigration and Control Act of 1986, employers must verify that every individual hired since November 6, 1986, is eligible to work in the United States and is not an undocumented individual.
retention_statement: Paper: Form I-9 must be retained by agency for three years or for one year past the end of employment, whichever is longer ; Electronic: Form I-9 must be retained by agency for three years or for one year past the end of employment, whichever is longer

series_description: Report of the amount of wages withheld to the Internal Revenue Service on an Employer''''s Quarterly Federal Tax Return.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and 4 years past

series_title: OHIO DEPARTMENT OF ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES DIRECTIVES
series_description: Ohio Department of Administrative Services directives.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until obsolete, superseded, replaced ; Electronic: Retain until obsolete, superseded, replaced

series_description: Correspondence to and from a party regarding a personnel public records request and the record request log.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: All records or phone logs dealing with employment references or employment verification of current or past employees.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year ; Electronic: 1 year

series_description: Any documentation regarding the rationale and justification for an actual layoff.
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years from notification of layoff

series_description: All federal and state compliance posters
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: A biennial snapshot of the staffing status.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value

series_description: A succession plan for key positions
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documentation relating to a filed union grievance
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years after date of final action from Office of Collective Bargaining

series_description: Documentation relating to any equal employment opportunity complaint
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years after date of separation/denial of hire

series_description: Investigative techniques manual
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Documentation relating to an on-the-job injury claim
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after employee separation ; Electronic: Retain 7 years after employee separation

series_description: Documentation related to applications/resumes, interview notes, and notification letters for an open positon
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years from date position was filled or withdrawn ; Electronic: Delete upon printing

series_description: Documentation as to why a charge was not filed; formerly known as A/B form
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years from office visit date

series_description: Phone and visitor logs that reflecting date, time, visitor, reason for call/visit, and staff member spoken with; mail log reflecting date and staff receiving incoming mail
retention_statement: Electronic: 2 years from date ; Paper: 2 years from date

series_description: Documentation related to a request for a Bona Fide Occupational Qualifications (BFOQ), agency decision, legal opinions, certification, and subsequent renewals.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years from certification date ; Electronic: 2 years from certification date

series_title: Certificates, Commendations, Proclamations, etc. Received by the Agency
series_description: Honorary recognition of service and achievement
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent

series_description: Presentations, handouts, and other correspondence and media related to training, education and outreach events
retention_statement: Paper: Until of no further administrative use ; Electronic: Until of no further administrative use

series_description: Press inquiries and related materials
retention_statement: Paper: 2 years ; Electronic: 2 years
